title: Spanish Pork Croquetas
description: A classic Spanish tapas dish made with tender pork and crispy breadcrumbs.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (175°C).
In a large bowl, combine the ground pork, breadcrumbs, onion, garlic, salt, and black pepper. Mix well.
Add the egg to the pork mixture and mix until just combined.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into small oval shapes, about 1 1/2 inches (3.8 cm) long.
Carefully place the croquetas in the hot oil, being careful not to overcrowd the pan.
Fry the croquetas for 3-4 minutes on each side, until they are golden brown and crispy.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the croquetas from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the croquetas hot and enjoy!
